project_info.name: ReachInsta
project_info.description: Premium modern SaaS landing website for competitor intelligence. Linear/Framer aesthetic. Production-ready, polished, trust-building.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Line height: tight (leading-none or leading-tight) for headers, loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Scale: Fluid typography, max text-6xl for Hero.
Follow 60-30-10 rule: 60% greyscale background/surface, 30% text/borders, 10% distinct accent color (#FF4500).
Never use pure transparent backgrounds over content without blur.
Hover state: button background must switch to a lighter hue or high-contrast state.

layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid Protocol. Use 'Control Room' mode for Dashboard mockups and 'Tetris' grid for Marketing Feature blocks.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard but generous. Use p-8, p-12, gap-8, gap-12 to create breathing room.
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (e.g., p-6 or p-8).
Asymmetry creates tension. Avoid perfect center alignment for everything. Left-align dense text.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary CTAs must use the accent_cta color. Use capsule (rounded-full) for hero CTAs for a sleek modern look. Must have focus/ring states.
components.cards: 1px subtle border, flat background or crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Avoid heavy drop shadows in dark mode, use inner glow/border instead.
components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur-xl), clear logo, CTA, and links. z-50.
components.dashboard_mockup: Do not use a static image. Build a realistic dashboard UI preview combining Tailwind, Recharts, and framer-motion. Animate the charts/stats appearing.
components.trust_badges: Implement an infinite marquee (react-fast-marquee or framer-motion) using lucide-react brand icons (e.g., Instagram, Youtube, Twitch, Twitter, Figma). Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.

hero_background.description: Elegant abstract black satin texture for deep premium dark mode hero background section. Overlay with bg-black/60.

rules: Max overlay opacity bg-black/50, unless you need pure text readability, then max bg-black/70.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use text-shadow over images if contrast fails.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements and form inputs MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute `yarn add framer-motion next-themes react-fast-marquee` as they are needed for the animations, theming, and trust badges.
Initialize the app in dark mode as default using next-themes.
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Build the dashboard mockup using Recharts and Tailwind (do not use a static image). Animate the data entering.
Use lucide-react for all iconography. Use lucide icons for Trust Badges instead of placeholder images.
Integrate Shadcn components: Accordion (FAQ), Cards (Features/Pricing), Forms (Contact/Auth/Login/Signup).
Ensure complete responsive design (mobile hamburger menu, stacked grids on mobile).
Implement the dark/light mode toggle in the navigation bar.
